runs.message: NO TRADE ALERT: Monday 2026-07-06 early-session check found Agentic at USD 2,000 cash/buying power with no positions or equity orders; memory/AI hardware tape is strong (WDC/AMD/STX/MRVL/SMH green) but the move is a broad gap/rebound with no confirmed pullback/VWAP entry or visible bid/ask spread from the public snapshot, so no setup clears the 80+ score gate.
